description:
Manually set the application domain and tenant ID for repository creation.

Args:
    domain: Application domain URL
    tenant_id: Tenant ID for the project
    project_name: Project name (optional)
    tenant_group_id: Tenant Group ID (optional)

Returns:
    JSON string with confirmation

description.name: create_project
description.description:
Create a new project in Selise Cloud.

Args:
    project_name: Name of the project to create
    repo_name: Repository name (e.g., 'username/repo')
    repo_link: Full GitHub repository URL
    repo_id: Repository ID from GitHub or Git provider
    is_production: Whether this is a production environ

description.name: get_auth_status
description.description:
Check current authentication status and token validity.

Returns:
    JSON string with authentication status

description.name: get_global_state
description.description:
Get the current global state including authentication and application domain.

Returns:
    JSON string with current global state

description.name: create_schema
description.description:
Create a new schema in Selise Blocks GraphQL API.

Args:
    schema_name: Name of the schema to create
    project_key: Project key (tenant ID). Uses global tenant_id if not provided

Returns:
    JSON string with schema creation result

description.name: list_schemas
description.description:
List schemas from Selise Blocks GraphQL API.

Args:
    project_key: Project key (tenant ID). Uses global tenant_id if not provided
    keyword: Search keyword for filtering schemas
    page_size: Number of items per page (default: 100)
    page_number: Page number for pagination (default: 1)
    so

description.name: get_schema
description.description:
Get a schema's current fields using its ID (step 1 of schema field management).

Args:
    schema_id: The ID of the schema to retrieve
    project_key: Project key (tenant ID). Uses global tenant_id if not provided

Returns:
    JSON string with schema fields and metadata

description.name: update_schema_fields
description.description:
Update schema fields (step 2 of schema field management).

Args:
    schema_id: The ID of the schema to update
    fields: List of SchemaField objects for the schema (existing + new).
            Each SchemaField has Name (str), Type (str), and IsArray (bool) properties.
            Reserved fields

description.name: finalize_schema
description.description:
Finalize schema changes by retrieving updated schema (step 3 of schema field management).

Args:
    schema_id: The ID of the schema to finalize
    project_short_key: Project short key.
    project_key: Project key (tenant ID). Uses global tenant_id if not provided

Returns:
    JSON string with fi

description.name: configure_blocks_data_gateway
description.description:
Configure Blocks Data Gateway for GraphQL operations.

Args:
    project_key: Project key (tenant ID). Uses global tenant_id if not provided
    connectionString: Connection string for the database
    databaseName: Name of the database

Returns:
    JSON string with data gateway configuration resul

description.name: get_blocks_data_gateway_config
description.description:
Get Blocks Data Gateway configuration.

Args:
    project_key: Project key (tenant ID). Uses global tenant_id if not provided

Returns:
    JSON string with data gateway configuration result

description.name: save_captcha_config
description.description:
Save CAPTCHA configuration for Google reCAPTCHA or hCaptcha.

Args:
    provider: CAPTCHA provider - "recaptcha" for Google reCAPTCHA or "hcaptcha" for hCaptcha
    site_key: Public site key from CAPTCHA provider console
    secret_key: Private secret key from CAPTCHA provider console
    project_ke

description.name: list_captcha_configs
description.description:
List all CAPTCHA configurations for a project.

Args:
    project_key: Project key (tenant ID). Uses global tenant_id if not provided

Returns:
    JSON string with list of CAPTCHA configurations

description.name: update_captcha_status
description.description:
Enable or disable a CAPTCHA configuration.

Args:
    item_id: The ID of the CAPTCHA configuration to update
    is_enable: True to enable, False to disable the configuration
    project_key: Project key (tenant ID). Uses global tenant_id if not provided

Returns:
    JSON string with status update

description.name: get_translation_languages
description.description:
Get available languages for translation in a project.

Args:
    project_key: Project key (tenant ID). Uses global tenant_id if not provided

Returns:
    JSON string with available languages including language names, codes, and default status

description.name: get_translation_modules
description.description:
Get available modules for translation in a project.

Args:
    project_key: Project key (tenant ID). Uses global tenant_id if not provided

Returns:
    JSON string with available modules including module names and IDs

description.name: get_module_keys
description.description:
Get available keys in a specific module for translation in a project.

Args:
    module_id: The ID of the module to get keys from
    project_key: Project key (tenant ID). Uses global tenant_id if not provided

Returns:
    JSON string with available keys including key names, IDs, and resources

description.name: create_module
description.description:
Create a new module for translation in a project.

Args:
    module_name: Name of the module to create
    project_key: Project key (tenant ID). Uses global tenant_id if not provided

Returns:
    JSON string with module creation result including module ID and name

description.name: save_module_keys_with_translations
description.description:
Save multiple translation keys with their translations to modules in a project.

Args:
    request: SaveKeysTranslationRequest object containing:
        - ProjectKey: Project key (tenant ID). Uses global tenant_id if not provided
        - Translations: List of SaveKeyTranslationRequest objects, ea

description.name: publish_translation
description.description:
Publish translations for a project, making them live and available for use.

This function publishes all translation keys and their translations for the specified project,
making them available in the production environment.

Args:
    project_key: Project key (tenant ID). Uses global tenant_id if n
